metadata.title: Putkipalvelu JV Oy — Plumbing, Heating & Renovation
metadata.description: Professional plumbing services, heating solutions and bathroom renovations. Reliable service.

common.name: Name
common.thankYouDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

home.heroSubtitle: We offer comprehensive plumbing services for homes and businesses. Plumbing, heating, sewers and bathroom renovations.
home.servicesSubtitle: Comprehensive range of plumbing services delivered with expertise.
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact us — we help quickly and professionally with all plumbing work.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Professional plumbing services for homes and businesses.

putkityot.title: Plumbing Work
putkityot.description: All plumbing work done professionally — installation, repair and maintenance. Water supply and heating piping.

lammitys.title: Heating Systems
lammitys.description: Installation, maintenance and repair of heating systems. Underfloor heating, radiators and heat pumps.

vesijohtotyot.title: Water Pipe Work
vesijohtotyot.description: Water pipe installation and repair. Leak detection and water system renewal.

viemariotyot.title: Sewer Work
viemariotyot.description: Sewer installation, repair and flushing. Blockage removal and sewer inspections.

kylpyhuoneremontti.title: Bathroom Renovations
kylpyhuoneremontti.description: Complete bathroom renovations on a turnkey basis. Waterproofing, tiling and fixture installation.

huolto.title: Maintenance
huolto.description: Regular plumbing maintenance and preventive upkeep. Property HVAC maintenance.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Putkipalvelu JV Oy — reliable plumbing expertise.
about.introP1: Putkipalvelu JV Oy is a professional plumbing company offering comprehensive plumbing services for households and businesses.
about.introP2: Our experienced team handles all plumbing work quickly and with quality — from small repairs to major renovations.
about.value1Desc: Experienced plumbers and continuous training guarantee quality work.
about.value2Desc: We stick to agreed schedules and prices. No surprises.
about.value3Desc: We listen to our customers and find the best solution for every situation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Don't hesitate to reach out — we're happy to help!
